title: Applying the cosine difference formula
text: Recall the difference identity for cosine: $$cos(A-B)$$ $$=$$ cos A cos B + sin A sin B

title: Evaluate trigonometric values
text: Determine the exact values of $$cos\left(\frac{5\pi}{6}\right)$$ and $$sin\left(\frac{5\pi}{6}\right)$$.

title: Evaluate $$cos\left(\frac{5\pi}{6}\right)$$
text: What is the exact value of $$cos\left(\frac{5\pi}{6}\right)$$?

title: Evaluate $$sin\left(\frac{5\pi}{6}\right)$$
text: What is the exact value of $$sin\left(\frac{5\pi}{6}\right)$$?
